title: CleanupProject
description: A land-cleanup project enrolled in one of OER's two remedial programs — the City Voluntary Cleanup Program (VCP) or the E-Designation/Restrictive Declaration Program. It carries the project through OER's documented remedial process from application/investigation to Notice of Satisfaction. Modeled from the OER Remedial Process (nyc.gov/site/oer/remediation), the 'OER Cleanup Sites' dataset (3279-pp7v), and the login-walled EPIC project portal (a002-epic.nyc.gov). Keyed on OER Project Number.

eDesignation.description: The (E)-designation number this cleanup resolves, if the project exists to clear an (E) requirement.

volunteer.description: The volunteer / applicant enrolling the site in the program (VCP 'volunteer' or E-Designation owner/developer).

enrolledDate.description: Date the site was enrolled in the program.

noticeToProceedIssued.description: Whether OER has issued a Notice to Proceed / Decision Document approving the remedial action work plan.

noticeOfSatisfactionIssued.description: Whether OER has issued a Notice of Satisfaction / Completion closing out the cleanup.

documentRepositoryUrl.description: Link to the project-specific document repository (EPIC).
